hero.headline: Financial management
hero.subtext: Full-service financial outsourcing - from bookkeeping to CFO functions. For Latvian and international companies
audienceQuestions: Have you just started a new business and want to be confident that profit will arrive exactly on schedule, with enough resources to reach your goals?
Does your municipality or NGO need a trusted advisor who not only understands business processes in detail, but also grasps global trends?
Are you leading a strong holding company and want to optimize operations for even greater profit, or planning to improve your financial indicators to become more attractive to investors?

founder.name: Agnese Pastare
founder.credentials: Mag.oec  ·  25+ years  ·  IFRS  ·  LCCI National Strategy Council member
bio: PB Finanses founder Agnese Pastare holds a Master's degree in economics (Mag.oec) from Riga Technical University and has worked in finance and business for more than 25 years.

Her experience spans the banking sector — as deputy head of the Ventspils branch and corporate lending specialist at Pirmā Banka (today Luminor) — international accounting practice, the transit business and real estate.

She holds IAB certificates in international accounting, IFRS reporting and financial analysis, chairs the board of ABZ Finance, and serves on the LCCI Kurzeme Entrepreneurs Council and the LCCI National Strategy Council.

Agnese is fluent in Latvian, Russian and English. Beyond finance she is an internationally titled art photographer (AFIAP) and a recipient of the Ventspils City Award for her contribution to the city's economic and cultural development.
founder.quote: Satisfied clients are our greatest reward

items.q: What's the difference between an accountant and a financial consultant?
items.a: An accountant works with fact and looks at the past - recording transactions that already happened and preparing reports. A financier works with a plan and looks at the future - helping you make decisions that will shape the company's results. PB Finanses offers both - everyday bookkeeping and a CFO's perspective on your business
Yes. In a free consultation we get to know your company's specifics, goals and current financial challenges, so we can offer a solution tailored to you - not a one-size-fits-all package

items.q: What needs to be handled right after starting a company?
items.a: Choosing the right business form, registration with the Register of Enterprises and the State Revenue Service, whether VAT registration is needed, evaluating the micro-tax regime, first contracts and payroll taxes - we help with all of this from day one

items.q: Do you work with international companies?
items.a: Yes. PB Finanses provides high-level outsourced services to both Latvian and international companies, and the team is fluent in Latvian, Russian and English

items.q: How is the price of a service determined?
items.a: Pricing is set individually - based on company size, industry and the scope of services needed. We don't offer a universal package, but a solution matched to your specific situation

items.q: Can you take over CFO functions without hiring a full-time employee?
items.a: Yes, that's one of our most popular services - cash flow management, budget control, risk analysis and external financing coordination, without the cost of a full-time employee
